title: Why I Quit My Dev Job Before AI Could Take It | Better Stack Podcast Ep. 16
summary: Elliot, a developer and content creator, quit his dev job to go full-time on YouTube before AI could displace him. He argues that LLMs are hitting diminishing returns, coding tutorials are dying, and believes AI is becoming the new SEO rather than a transformative force in development.
